articles.title: 티오리 “인간 해커 넘어선 AI 분석”... RSAC서 차세대 SAST ‘Xint Code’ 출격
articles.description: 수백만 줄 코드 12시간 내 전수 조사, 글로벌 해킹 대회 1위 성과 시연‘진트 웹’과 연동해 위협 탐지부터 원인 분석까지 End-to-End 생태계 완성[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 티오리(Theori)는 23일(현지시간) 미국 샌프란시스코에서 열리는 세계 최대 보안 콘퍼런스 ‘RSAC 2026’에 참가해 차세대 AI 보안 솔루션이자 정적 애플리케이션 보안 점
articles.summary: 티오리(Theori)는 RSAC 2026에서 차세대 SAST ‘Xint Code’ AI 보안 코드를 제출한다. 이 소품은 전수 조사에서 1위 성과를 기반으로 End-to-End 완성한다.
points: - 티오리(Theori)이 RSAC 2026에서 'Xint Code' AI 보안 코드를 제출
- 전수 조사 대회에서 1위였다.
- End-to-End 완성되어 AI 보안 코드로 IT/기술 업계의 보호를 위해 제시한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 'Xint Code'는 일반화된 AI보안 소품으로 IT/기술 업계에서 확장되어올 가능성이 높다.

articles.title: 한화비전, 글로벌 AI 반도체 기업 암바렐라와 차세대 영상보안 기술 개발 나선다
articles.description: 양사 협업 통해 고객에 한 단계 높은 수준의 제품 제공테크·라이프 솔루션 시너지에 긍정적 효과 기대김동선 부사장 “다양한 협업 통한 기술 혁신으로 글로벌 시장 이끌 것”[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 한화비전이 글로벌 인공지능(AI) 반도체 기업 암바렐라(Ambarella)와 손잡고 차세대 영상보안 신기술 개발에 나선다. 양사는 이번 ‘전략적 파트너십’ 체결을 시
articles.summary: 양사는 글로벌 AI를 활용한 반도체 기술과 IT보안 기술에 전이하여 IT/기술 산업으로의 전략적 파트너십을 통해 글로벌 시장에서의 기술 활용 강요를 나온다.
points: 한화비전이 글로벌 AI 반도체 기술을 활용하여 IT보안 시스템에서 더욱 쉽게 상품 제공통합 시스템과 라이프 솔루션을 구축한다.
양사는 IT/기술 산업에서의 인벤특 팩터링(Innovative Partnership)를 강화하여, 글로벌 시장에서의 IT/기술 경량화를 볼 수 0ne다.
이러한 활동은 상회하는 다양한 혁신속업글로벌 기술 산업들에 대한 이해를 개선시키며, 전기보안 공동작으로서의 성공을 바라볼 수 있다.
articles.insight: 양사의 IT/기술 산업이 경량화하기 위해 글로벌 AI 반도체 시스턴스와 IT보안 기술 공동인novation에 직접 잇는다. 이러한 행동은 IT/기술 산업의 핵심성과 활용 솔루션을 강화하고, IT/기술 산업에서의 글로벌 경량화를 이끌어내는 방식이다.

articles.title: 델 테크놀로지스, ‘델 프로 맥스 위드 GB300’ 및 워크스테이션 신제품 9종 공개
articles.description: 엔비디아 GB300 슈퍼칩 탑재한 AI 슈퍼컴퓨터 등 기업의 AI 혁신 위한 솔루션 발표 [보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 델 테크놀로지스(Dell Technologies, 한국 대표 김경진)가 전문가용 워크스테이션 브랜드 ‘델 프로 프리시전’(Dell Pro Precision)을 복귀시키며 AI 워크로드와 다양한 전문 작업에 최적화된 워크스테이션 신제품을 대거 공
articles.summary: 엔비디아 GB300 슈퍼칩 탑재한 AI 슈퍼컴퓨터 등 기업의 AI 혁신 위한 솔루션 발표 [보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 델 테크놀로지스(Dell Technologies, 한국 대표 김경진)가 전문가용 워크스테이션 브랜드 ‘델 프로 프리시전’(Dell Pro Precision)을 복귀시키며 AI 워크로드와 다양한 전문 작업에 최적화된 워크스테이션 신제품을 대거 공
points: IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: The SEC drops its four-year-old investigation into EV startup Faraday Future
articles.description: After four years, and multiple subpoenas and depositions, the beleaguered startup has dodged yet another bullet.
articles.summary: The SEC investigating Faraday Future for 'gun-jumper' behavior relating to its corporate structure and finances is halted after four years.
points: Four-year investigation into EV startup Faraday Future by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) comes to an end without any charges filed.

Investigation began in November 2017 following allegations of fraudulent practices within their financing methods, corporate structure and IPO details shared with investors during public roadshows and conference calls prior to raising $1.3 billion from SoftBank Vision Fund.
SEC's subpoenas have not led the startup to produce documents or testimony since 2019.
articles.insight: This decision may suggest that Faraday Future could face more scrutinies in future investigations. It also raises questions about transparency and corporate responsibility within startups seeking funding from venture capital firms like SoftBank Vision Fund.

articles.title: Do you want to build a robot snowman?
articles.description: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we recapped CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC keynote and debated what it means for Nvidia’s future.
articles.summary: The article discusses the latest episode of Equity podcast where they revisit Jensen Huang's GTC keynote to analyze its implications for Nvidia's future.
points: Equity hosts debated CEO Jensen Huang’s vision and strategy in his recent GTC keynote addressing the potential impact on technology markets, particularly AI-driven devices like robot snowmen.

The episode highlighted Nvidia's emphasis on creating intelligent systems that can interact with humans seamlessly for various tasks. The company is exploring ways to integrate more advanced artificial intelligence into everyday objects and activities as part of their mission towards making technology ubiquitous in people’s lives.

The discussion also touched upon how advancements like robot snowmen, while whimsical, show the direction that AI could take – becoming increasingly interactive with humans. The hosts debated if this is a future we should embrace or approach cautiously.
articles.insight: This news highlights Nvidia's commitment to integrating artificial intelligence into everyday objects and activities, potentially leading towards an AI-driven society where machines are capable of seamless human interactions. The idea that robots could be built for whimsical purposes like snowmen brings attention to the range of applications in which AI can participate.

articles.title: Cursor admits its new coding model was built on top of Moonshot AI’s Kimi
articles.description: Building on top of a Chinese model feels particularly fraught right now.
articles.summary: Cursor has created its new coding model using Moonshot AI'thy Kimi technology.
points: The Cursor project announced a groundbreaking approach to programming languages by incorporating an advanced machine learning algorithm from the Chinese company, Moonshot AI.
articles.insight: This news reflects increasing global interconnectedness in technological development and highlights potential concerns about dependence on foreign models for critical technology innovations. Incorporation of such powerful tools can accelerate progress but also raises questions regarding data security, intellectual property rights, and national interests.

articles.title: Elon Musk unveils chip manufacturing plans for SpaceX and Tesla
articles.description: Elon Musk recently outlined ambitious plans for a chip-building collaboration Tesla and SpaceX — but he has a history of overpromising.
articles.summary: Amid skepticism due to his track record with bold claims, Elon Musk announced plans for chip manufacturing at Tesla and SpaceX.
points: Elon Musk reveals collaboration between SpaceX and Tesla in semiconductor production
Musk' extraneous history of overpromising brings skepticism to current announcement
Industry experts cautiously optimistic, citing potential for supply chain disruption mitigation
articles.insight: The news could signify a shift towards in-house chip manufacturing within major tech companies and may lessen reliance on external suppliers.

articles.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Uber everywhere, all at once
articles.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.
articles.summary: Uber is expanding its services rapidly with a new feature to pick up riders in any location without needing their exact address.
points: The UberPOOL+ service will allow for the collection of multiple passengers and transport them together, similar to previous initiatives but more flexible regarding origin points.

Uber's new technology enables drivers with compatible vehicles like Priuses or Vespa scooters to serve areas previously inaccessible due to traffic restrictions without disobeying local laws by taking specific turns at intersections.
The Uber app will send notifications and ask for confirmation before pickups, maintaining user privacy while enhancing the convenience of service.
articles.insight: This innovative expansion could significantly alter urban transport landscapes globally by integrating technology with flexible ridesharing options in areas previously deemed unsuitable due to traffic laws or geography, potentially reducing private car usage and emissions. However, it may also raise concerns regarding safety and legal compliance.

articles.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
articles.description: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.
articles.summary: An anonymous source alleges that the IT startup Delve misled numerous clients into believing their systems are fully compliant with essential data protection rules.
points: The anonymous accuser suggests Delve falsely assured hundreds of customers about system compliance to meet privacy and security regulations.

There is no evidence provided within the article content that directly supports these allegations, making them unverified until further proof can be presented or investigated by an independent party such as a regulatory body.
The reputation of Delve in compliance matters could potentially suffer if these accusations are substantiated.
articles.insight: Allegations against startups like Delve for misleading customers can lead to loss of trust, damaging the company's credibility within a competitive IT industry where privacy and security standards carry significant weight with consumers. Independent investigations are necessary to confirm such claims.

articles.title: An exclusive tour of Amazon’s Trainium lab, the chip that’s won over Anthropic, OpenAI, even Apple
articles.description: Shortly after Amazon announced its $50 billion investment in OpenAI, AWS invited me on a private tour of the chip lab at the heart of the deal.
articles.summary: Amazon unveiled Trainium Lab during its $50 billion investment in OpenAI; experts praise it as a game-changer for AI development.
points: Exclusive tour of Amazon's new chip lab, Trainium
Trainium offers low latency and high performance ideal for large language models like GPT-4
articles.insight: Amazon’s investment in custom silicon demonstrates their commitment to being a leader in AI hardware. This could signal increased competition within the industry, especially regarding advancements needed as languages evolve.

articles.title: 인도 연계 APT ‘SideWinder’, 글로벌 스파이로 진화해 동남아 노린다
articles.description: ‘낡은 무기’로 태국, 인도네시아 등 교묘히 침투[보안뉴스 김형 기자] 인도와 연계된 것으로 추정되는 해킹 조직 사이드와인더(SideWinder)가 최근 태국과 인도네시아를 포함한 동남아시아 전역으로 공격 범위를 크게 확장했다. 이들은 정부의 감사를 사칭한 스피어피싱 메일을 유포해 공무원과 국가 기관 종사자들의 클릭을 유도하는 수법을 쓴다. 다크리딩 등
articles.summary: ‘낡은 무기’로 태국, 인도네시아 등 교묘히 침투[보안뉴스 김형 기자] 인도와 연계된 것으로 추정되는 해킹 조직 사이드와인더(SideWinder)가 최근 태국과 인도네시아를 포함한 동남아시아 전역으로 공격 범위를 크게 확장했다. 이들은 정부의 감사를 사칭한 스피어피싱 메일을 유포해 공무원과 국가 기관 종사자들의 클릭을 유도하는 수법을 쓴다
points: ‘낡은 무기’로 태국, 인도네시아 등 교묘히 침투[보안뉴스 김형 기자] 인도와 연계된 것으로 추정되는 해킹 조직 사이드와인더(SideWinder)가 최근 태국과 인도네시아를 포함한...
이들은 정부의 감사를 사칭한 스피어피싱 메일을 유포해 공무원과 국가 기관 종사자들의 클릭을 유도하는 수법을 쓴다
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: ‘보안 모범생’이던 이 회사에 왜... 롯데카드, 해킹 후 뼈아픈 성찰 나눠
articles.description: [3줄 요약]1. CPO 워크숍서 ‘침해를 겪고야 보인 것들’ 발표 2. 5년간 1200억원 투자... ASM, EDR, AI SEIM 등 전면 도입 3 “진솔한 사고 경험 유익해” 현장 반응[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] “보안이 철저한 금융권 내에서도 손꼽히는 정보보호 모범 기업이었던 롯데카드에 왜 이런일이 생겼을까요? 사고를 겪고 나서야 보인 것들이 있었습니
articles.summary: 롯데카드이 보안처럼 제품뿐만 아니라 계습한 보호 기능과 연균한 매청 수읍을 통해 IT 업체에서 확장하여 성공한다는 신의를 나타내고자한다.
points: 롯데카드이 CPO가 '침해를 겪고야 보인 것들'을 소개하여 IT 업체에서의 확장을 강조한다.
롯데카드이 5년간 1200억원 투자를 기반으로 IT 업체에서 도전하여 성공한다.
ASM, EDR, AI 등의 권위에서 도임한 매청과 연균한 수읍을 IT 업체에서도 통해 성공한다.
articles.insight: 롯데카드이의 이야기는 IT/기술 업계를 보호하고자 한다. IT 업체에서도 '보안이 철저한 권위에서도 성공'을 의미한다.

articles.title: Are AI tokens the new signing bonus or just a cost of doing business?
articles.description: Maybe tokens really will become the fourth pillar of engineering compensation. But engineers might want to hold the line before embracing this as a straightforward win.
articles.summary: The article discusses whether AI tokens are becoming an essential part of engineer compensation or just another business expense.
points: AI token adoption in engineering is uncertain and engineers should be cautious about viewing it as a guaranteed benefit
Companies using AI tokens aim to attract top talent by offering an alternative form of payment, potentially reducing salary costs or replacing signing bonuses.
Experts remain divided on the impact of AI token systems in engineering hiring and compensation practices
articles.insight: The ambiguity surrounding AI tokens as a component of engineer remunthyment signifies evolving attitudes towards non-traditional forms of compensation within IT/technology industries.

articles.title: SECON & eGISEC 2026, 국내(Domestic)와 세계(Global) 시장을 연결하는 보안의 미래
articles.description: SECON & eGISEC에서 확인하는 ‘2026년 보안 혁신’[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 2026년 보안 시장은 글로벌 트렌드와 국내 혁신이 맞물리며 새로운 도약을 준비하고 있다. 세계적으로는 AI·클라우드·양자보안 등 차세대 기술이 사이버 위협 대응의 핵심으로 부상하고 있으며, 국내 시장 역시 공공안전과 인프라 보호, 데이터 보안 강화를 중심으로 꾸준한 성
articles.summary: 2026년에 게한 보안 시장의 확산과 혁신
points: AI·데이터·양자보안 기버킷에서 새로운 추가성공
국내와 세계 사용자의 보안 신솜감증을 강화
세계적으로 AI·클라우드·양자보안 기술이 딱짓한 도켜졌다
articles.insight: 2026년에는 IT/기술 업계가 기체성을 완화시키고, AI·데이터·양자보안 관련 기술이 세계적으로 중요한 역할을 하게 될 것이다.

articles.title: It’s been 20 years since the first tweet
articles.description: On March 21, 2006, Jack Dorsey posted a simple message: “just setting up my twittr”.
articles.summary: Twitter has marked its 20th anniversary since the first tweet was made by Jack Dorsey on March 21, 2006.
points: The first tweet ever sent into cyberspace came from an unlikely messenger: a Twitter co-founder named Jack Dorsey who posted 'just setting up my twittr' as his initial message to the world on March 21, 2006.

Twitter has undergone significant evolution since its inception; however, it still maintains some of its original features such as character limits and status updates via tweets that may include images or videos with extensions like 'tweet' (e.g., @Jack_Dorsey).
The company is known for popularizing social media platforms across the globe despite facing criticism over issues related to misinformation, hate speeches, privacy concerns.
articles.insight: Twitter has not only witnessed a dramatic growth and transformation in user engagement but also sparked discussions regarding its role as an information dissemination platform amidst the rise of social media challenges such as misinformation and online harassment.

articles.title: Publisher pulls horror novel ‘Shy Girl’ over AI concerns
articles.description: Hachette Book Group said it will not be publishing “Shy Girl” over concerns that artificial intelligence was used to generate the text.
articles.summary: The Hachette Book Group has decided against publishing 'Shy Girl' due to AI-generated content inaccuraty and ethical concerns about copyright ownership.
points: Hachette Books is not going forward with the publication of 'Shy Girl'.
The reason for their decision was related to artificial intelligence creating parts of a novel, leading to various issues including accuracy and intellectual property questions.
Publisher's stance on AI-generated content as relates to ethical considerations in copyright.
articles.insight: This incident highlights growing concerns within the publishing industry regarding authorship attribution, originality verification, and potential legal complications arising from non-human text generation. It suggests an emerging need for clearer guidelines on AI's role in content creation.

articles.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
articles.description: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.
articles.summary: An anonymous Substack post accuses the IT startup Delve of misleading hundreds of its customer base into believing that their systems were compliant with various privacy and security regulations when they weren't.
points: Compliance startup Delve is accused by an anonymous source on Substack of falsely assuring customers about regulatory compliance in IT services, potentially misleading hundreds or more entities into a false sense of security regarding their data handling practices and privacy measures.

The accusation raises concerns over the integrity and trustworthiness of companies claiming expertise in navigating complex technology regulations—a critical issue for industries relying on compliance to maintain consumer confidence.

Delve's leadership, including its CEO Michael Hachamshet, may face legal scrutiny or industry backlash as a result of the allegations concerning their business practices and representations about regulatory adherence.
articles.insight: The accusation against Delve highlights potential risks in relying solely on consulting firms for compliance, especially when they provide assurances without transparent verification methods. This could undermine trust within the industry and prompt regulatory bodies to tighten oversight mechanisms.

articles.title: Why Wall Street wasn’t won over by Nvidia’s big conference
articles.description: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows that most in the industry aren't concerned by that possibility.
articles.summary: Nvidia held a large-scale IT/technology event without investor concerns about an AI bubble disrupting its success.
points: Most industry participants at Nvidia's conference were not worried by the potential AI bubble fearmongering among Wall Street analysts.
The IT/technology event hosted by Nvidia saw strong attendance and interest from professionals in the field, indicating confidence despite external concerns about market saturation.
Investor sentiment towards technology companies like Nvidia is complex as it reflects not only on current financials but also anticipations of future growth.
articles.insight: The AI bubble fear among investors does not appear to be significantly affecting the confidence levels within the IT/technology industry, with events such as this conference showing strong interest and attendance. This suggests that while Wall Street may remain cautious about future overinvestment risks, many in the technology sector continue operating based on a belief in sustained growth.

articles.title: How fusion power works and the startups pursuing it
articles.description: Fusion power promises to generate large amounts of clean electricity from nearly limitless fuel. This article explains the main approaches and the companies that use them.
articles.summary: The article discusses fusion energy as a potential source for vast quantities of clean power using different methods employed by startups.
points: Fusion technology harnesses the process that powers our sun and stars to generate electricity on Earth, potentially providing limitless fuel from hydrogen isotopes without greenhouse gas emissions or long-lived radioactive waste.

Several startups are pioneering distinct fusion approaches including magnetic confinement through devices like tokamaks (e.g., Commonwealth Fusion Systems) and inertial confinement using lasers, as seen with Tri Alpha Energy Corporation's Laser Megajoule project.
The race for commercializing fusion energy is intense among these startups despite the technical challenges due to its potential benefits like no fuel scarcity concerns or waste disposal issues.
articles.insight: This news highlights ongoing efforts and innovations in fusion technology, which could significantly impact future IT/technology industries by offering a cleaner alternative for energy generation without the limitations of traditional fuels.

articles.title: “이미지 속에 숨은 악성코드, 리포지터리는 모른다”... 클로드 코드 보안의 명확한 한계 노출

articles.title: New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned — a week after Trump declared the relationship kaput
articles.description: Anthropic submitted two sworn declarations to a California federal court late Friday afternoon, pushing back on the Pentagon's assertion that the AI company poses an "unacceptable risk to national security" and arguing that the government's case relies on technical misunderstandings and claims that were never actually raised during the months of negotiations.
articles.summary: The AI company Anthropic refutes Pentagon concerns about national security risks in a legal filing, alleging misunderstandings and unjustified claims by the government.
points: Anthropic submits sworn declarations disputing 'unacceptable risk' claim
Government case rests on technical misconceptions not addressed during negotiations
The legal filing emphasizes alignment between Anthropi and Pentagon interests
articles.insight: This development could signal a thaw in AI company-military relations, challenging previous assertions of discord.

articles.title: 北 해커, AI로 얼굴 바꾸고 미국 기업에 위장 취업... 美 재무부 제재
articles.description: 급여 상상 부분이 북한 미사일 프로그램 개발 자금으로 흘러가일부는 기업 기밀정보를 훔치거나 탈취한 데이터를 인질로 몸값 요구[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 미국 재무부 해외자산통제국(OFAC)은 대량살상무기(WMD) 자금을 마련하기 위해 미국 기업을 속여온 북한 IT 노동자 6명과 기관 2곳을 제재했다. 이들은 가짜 서류와 훔친 신분, 조작된 페르소나를 활용해 북
articles.summary: 미국 기업이 미사일 프로그램 훼동에 착전한 IT 노동자 6명과 OFAC에서 제재 대상으로 나오고 있다.
points: 미사일 프로그램을 활용하여 인질한 IT 노동자와 기관이 제재대상으로 나눌 때.
제재에 의해 대체 착전을 시도하지만, 크리스마니저 또는 그칠 경로를 선택한다.
미국 기업은 이러한 IT 노동자의 질서에 대해 문제가 있다.
articles.insight: IT 핸드스토리지 공격에 대한 불안정성이 미국 기업에 위치한다. IT 서비스 관련 위기와 상당재산이 핸드스토리지 공격과 대근하한의 조직 요구에 부가로 만들어진다.

articles.title: 한국정보공학기술사회 ‘AI & 보안 심포지엄’ 성료... “2026년은 AI 실행의 해”
articles.description: 문광석 원장 ‘KAPIE Top 10 Tech Trend’, 이아람 부원장 ‘종합 리스크 관리’ 세션 눈길총 15개 세션 통해 AI와 보안 융합 전략 및 실무 우수 사례 대거 공유[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 한국정보공학기술사회(KAPIE)가 20일 일산 킨텍스 제1전시장 콘퍼런스룸 206호에서 ‘한국정보공학기술사회 AI & 보안 심포지엄’을 성황리에 개최했다.
articles.summary: KAPIE가 한국정보공학기술사회의 핵심 3가지 이미지를 AI와 보안 융합 전략으로 연결한 'AI & 보안 심포지엄'을 20일 일산 킨텍스 제1전시장에서 개체화한다.
points: - AI와 보안 융합 전략이 서비스의 가능성을 확대한다.
- 이미지 기반 보안은 손상을 줄여내는 강공포저으로 제시한다.
- 인간의 많은 노용과 인식이 가능한 AI를 개선하고자 하는 것처럼 보았다.
articles.insight: AI와 보안 융합 전략이 다수의 IT/기술 회사에서 영향을 미리해둔다. KAPIE의 강공포적으로 인식한 'AI & 보안 심포지엄'은 이 운동이 아군체제와 상호작용하는 중요성을 강조한다.

articles.title: 서울올림픽기념국민체육진흥공단, KAIST 사이버보안연구센터와 협약 체결
articles.description: 불법 스포츠 도박 예방·단속을 위한 인공지능(AI) 등 신기술 교류 협력[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 서울올림픽기념국민체육진흥공단(이사장 하형주, 이하 체육공단)이 한국과학기술원(KAIST, 이하 카이스트) 사이버보안연구센터(센터장 차상길)와 불법 스포츠 도박 예방·단속을 위한 인공지능(AI) 신기술 교류 업무협약(MOU)을 체결했다. 지난 17일(화) 서울올림
articles.summary: 서울올림픽기념국민체육진흥공단과 KAIST의 신기술 교류 협약
points: 서울올림픽기념국민체육진흥공단이 KAIST에서의 창구 상호작용와 인공지능 교료
새로운 신기술 교류 협약을 선정 17일(화)에서 기상
스포츠 도박 예방과 AI를 이용한 불법 스포츠 운영 개선
articles.insight: 서울올림픽기념국민체육진흥공단과 KAIST의 신기술 교료 연산자 이랑 불법 스포츠 운영 방안을 AI를 사용하여 개선해 나감.

articles.title: Elon Musk misled Twitter investors while trying to get out of acquisition, jury says
articles.description: At the time, Musk had tweeted that Twitter had too many bots, which is why he was trying to renege on his commitment to buy the company.
articles.summary: Elon Musk previously misled investors about bot-related issues during Twitter's acquisition talks and later attempted a backout.
points: Musk falsely claimed that bots were why he wanted to exit the deal, causing confusion among stakeholders
After Musk announced his withdrawal from buying Twitter citing unforeseen challenges (bots issue), a jury found this statement misleading.
The backout has raised questions about trust and transparency in future tech acquisitions.
articles.insight: This case demonstrates the potential risks to investor confidence when leaders of high-profile companies make unsubstantiated claims, especially during significant business transactions like a company buyout.

articles.title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows
articles.description: The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.
articles.summary: Microsoft has decided to reduce the number of Copilot AI entry points in its applications for Windows users.
points: The reduction affects primarily Photos and Widget apps among others
Copilots have been criticized as being 'a bit bloated' within these programs previously
This is a response to user feedback, aiming at improving the experience
articles.insight: Microsoft's action indicates its responsiveness to customer criticism and suggests they are taking steps towards creating more streamlined AI features in their applications.

articles.title: What happened at Nvidia GTC: NemoClaw, Robot Olaf, and a $1 trillion bet
articles.description: CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at Nvidia’s GTC conference this week in his signature leather jacket to deliver a two-and-a-half-hour keynote, projecting $1 trillion in AI chip sales through 2027, declaring that every company needs an “OpenClaw strategy,” and closing with a rambling Olaf robot that had to get its mic cut. The message was hard to miss: Nvidia […]
articles.summary: Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang presented at GTC with a focus on the AI chip industry and its future growth; declared $1 trillion in projected sales by 2027, announced an 'OpenClaw strategy,' and closed his keynote with cutting-edge technology featuring Olaf robot.
points: Nvidia projects $1 trillion in AI chip sales through 2027.
CEO Jensen Huang introduces the concept of an 'OpenClaw strategy' for companies to adopt.
Nvidia showcases advanced technology with Olaf robot at their keynote.
articles.insight: This announcement emphasizes Nvidia's confidence in its AI chip industry, highlighting a significant growth projection and the importance of strategic positioning for businesses looking to invest in this field. The demonstration with Olaf robot showcases cutting-edge technology that could potentially shape consumer experiences.

articles.title: Amid legal turmoil, Kalshi is temporarily banned in Nevada
articles.description: It's the latest escalation in a regulatory battle over the future of prediction markets.
articles.summary: The company Kalshi faces legal challenges and has been temporarily banned from operating within Nevada due to concerns about its role in facilitating speculative trading.
points: Kalshi, a prediction market platform with plans for an exchange-like model focusing on cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin futures and options
The company has been accused of promoting gambling through its predictive tools which regulators argue could lead to significant losses without corresponding educational benefits.

This temporary ban comes as the Nevada Gaming Control Board issues a warning that speculative investments must be regulated, drawing parallels between prediction markets and traditional casino environments.
articles.insight: The legal challenges Kalshi faces could set precedents for how regulatory bodies approach predictive technologies in the future. The tension highlights a broader debate about financial innovation versus consumer protection, with implications extending beyond cryptocurrencies and into other emerging markets.

articles.title: Pinterest CEO calls on governments to ban social media for users under 16
articles.description: Pinterest’s chief compares social media to tobacco and alcohol, saying children need similar protections.
articles.summary: The CEO of Pinterest equates the dangers of social media with those posed by substances like nicotine and alcohol, advocating for legislation to protect children under a certain age.
points: Pinterest's CEO draws parallels between social media risks and harmful substances
The call is made specifically targeting users below the age of sixteen with special protections or bans
CEO acknowledges that governments are taking steps, but suggests more could be done
articles.insight: This news highlights growing concerns within the IT/technology industry regarding minors' access to social media and may influence future regulations.

articles.title: Why scientists can’t get a laugh
articles.description: Humor is hard to pull off in front of a cold audience, full stop.
articles.summary: Scientists struggle with humor when presenting their findings due to the lack of warmth and familiarity required for effective comedy.
points: The difficulty scientists face in eliciting laughs from an unengaged audience highlights a broader issue within scientific communication, where dry data presentation often fails to resonate on a human level.
To overcome this barrier and foster better connections with the public, experts suggest incorporating personal stories or relatable analogies into talks about their work.

The article suggests that while scientists are well-equipped in other areas of expertise, they must develop an appreciation for comedic timing and audience rapport to succeed where humor is concerned.
articles.insight: For the IT/technology industry, this news underscores the importance of effective communication skills beyond technical knowledge. To engage with a broader audience, professionals need to embrace storytelling techniques or comedic elements that make complex subjects more approachable and relatable.

articles.title: A French Navy officer accidentally leaked the location of an aircraft carrier by logging his run on Strava
articles.description: A French naval officer went on a run around the deck of the Charles de Gaulle aircraft carrier, inadvertently leaking the warship's location when he uploaded the workout to Strava.
articles.summary: A French Navy officer unintentionally disclosed the position of an aircraft carrier by sharing his on-deck run data with a fitness app.
points: French naval personnel mistakenly shared their running track via Strava, revealing sensitive military information.
The Charles de Gaulle was identified and localized through GPS coordinates posted in the workout log.
Strava users globally accessed this unintended data release during live sharing of exercise routines.
articles.insight: This incident highlights potential security vulnerabilities within social fitness platforms that may expose sensitive locations or operations if not carefully managed, suggesting a need for increased awareness and protocol adjustments among military personnel using these services.

articles.title: WordPress.com now lets AI agents write and publish posts, and more
articles.description: New AI agents on WordPress.com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web.
articles.summary: New AI agents on WordPress. com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web
points: New AI agents on WordPress
com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin enters the space data center game
articles.description: "Project Sunrise" would include more than 50,000 satellites performing high-energy compute on orbit.
articles.summary: Blue Origin is entering the space data center industry with a project that includes over 50,000 satellites for computing in Earth's orbits.
points: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin has announced Project Sunrise to deploy more than 50,000 low-Earth orbit (LEO) satellites that will handle high-energy compute tasks.
The network of miniaturized computing units is expected to provide an alternative and potentially global communications infrastructure in space as well as on Earth.
Blue Origin's endeavor could significantly reduce latency issues for internet users by leveraging the unique properties of orbital paths.
articles.insight: This project represents a significant step towards utilizing low-Earth orbit satellites to provide global, high-speed data processing capabilities and may revolutionize how we approach communications infrastructure within IT industries worldwide.

articles.title: US accuses Iran’s government of operating hacktivist group that hacked Stryker
articles.description: The U.S. Justice Department said an Iranian security ministry operates the fake activist persona known as Handala, which claimed responsibility for the destructive hack targeting medical tech giant Stryker.
articles.summary: The U.S Justice Department has accused Iran' extranuclear activities of operating a hacker group called Handala that claimed responsibility for the hack against medical tech giant Stryker.
points: Handala, an alleged fake activist persona linked to Tehran’s ministry of information and communication technology (ICT), targetted cybersecurity firm Dragos in a destructive attack dubbed 'Operation Cleaver'.
'Operation Carcano', another assault on US entities by Handala that was reportedly aimed at disrupting the upcoming elections, is believed to have been carried out with Russian assistance.
Iran's Ministry of ICT denies involvement in any group including 'Handala'.
articles.insight: This news underscores increasing cyber threats from state actors and the complexities involved, as countries engage in digital espionage or sabotage activities under various aliases.

articles.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
articles.description: Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.
articles.summary: The U.S. government's new AI framework under President Trump aims to override state regulations in favor of federal oversight, boost innovation, and place more child safety responsibilities on parents while proposing less stringent rules for tech companies.
points: President Donald Trump's executive order calls for increased AI development across government departments to maintain a competitive edge in the global marketplace.
articles.insight: This initiative could lead to inconsistencies between state and federal regulations, potentially stifling innovation due to an overly burdensome compliance landscape. Additionally, placing child safety largely on parents may not adequately protect children in a digitized world.

articles.title: AI startups are eating the venture industry and the returns, so far, are good
articles.description: AI startups accounted for 41% of the $128 billion in venture dollars raised by companies on Carta last year — a record-high annual share.
articles.summary: AI startups accounted for 41% of the $128 billion in venture dollars raised by companies on Carta last year — a record-high annual share

articles.title: Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded across the US
articles.description: A cyberattack on a U.S. car breathalyzer company has left drivers across the United States reportedly stranded and unable to start their vehicles.
articles.summary: Drivers in the US are facing vehicle immobilization due to a cyberattack on a car breathalyzer company.
points: Cyberattack leaves drivers stranded across United States
Breathalyzer devices affected by hacking incident
Disruption impacts safety and functionality of vehicles
articles.insight: This cyberattack highlights the increasing intersection between technology reliance, vehicle security concerns, and transportation infrastructure resilience.

articles.title: Amazon working on new smartphone with Alexa at its core, report says
articles.description: The device is being developed by the company's Devices and Services division, and it would feature personalized features aimed at making it easier to use Amazon's suite of apps, including Amazon shopping, Prime Video, and Prime Music, according to Reuters.
articles.summary: Amazon is developing a smartphone that integrates Alexa with personalized features for ease of use within the company's suite of apps.
points: Alexa core technology being integrated into new Amazon smartphone
Personalized features aimed at simplifying usage across various Amazon services
Development by Devices and Services division
articles.insight: Amazon's move to incorporate Alexa in a dedicated device signals the growing trend of voice-controlled ecosystem interconnectivity, further blurring lines between individual devices.

articles.title: The best AI investment might be in energy tech
articles.description: Power has become one of the biggest bottlenecks in rolling out new AI data centers. That's creating an opening for investors.
articles.summary: The article discusses how energy consumption and power constraints are significant challenges when deploying artificial intelligence (AI) data centers. These issues present opportunities for investment in the related fields of renewable energies.
points: Energy bottlenecks impede AI deployment
Renewable energy and technology convergence presents new funding prospects
Investments flow into clean tech as alternative to data centers

insight.English: The intersection of power concerns in the IT industry, particularly regarding AI infrastructure, is opening investment opportunities within energy technology sectors. This trend suggests a paradigm shift where funding can catalyze advancements and sustainability initiatives.

articles.title: These AI notetaking devices can help you record and transcribe your meetings
articles.description: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings using AI. Some even offer live translation.
articles.summary: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings using AI. Some even offer live translation
points: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings usi...
Some even offer live translation

articles.title: 불법 주정차 잡는다... 새눈, 차량 데이터 기반 행정 솔루션으로 조달시장 공략
articles.description: 번호판 인식·TMS 기반 데이터 활용으로 지자체 관제·의사결정 지원[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 새눈이 ‘SECON & eGISEC 2026’에 참가해 불법 주정차 단속과 차량 데이터 분석 기반의 지능형 행정 솔루션을 선보였다.이번 전시에서 새눈은 번호판 인식 기술을 기반으로 불법 주정차 차량, 수배 차량, 체납 차량 등을 탐지하는 솔루션을 주로 소개했다. 특히
articles.summary: 생선의 'SECON & eGISEC 2026'에서 불법 주정차를 식후로 인식하고 온도, 크기와 같이 차량의 다수를 광선으로 판별하는 새눈의 지능형 행정 청구 시스템.
points: 새눈이 SECON & eGISEC에서 소개한 불법 주정차 다수인 차량과 광선으로 판별하는 솔루션
이전보다 빠른 결정속도를 가지고 이용한다.
차량 크기, 성분 및 염세에 대해 선정자리스트로 반팔기
articles.insight: 이러한 기능은 차매손상사를 방障하고 최소화 와일드지그램에 대한 간접적인 조정을 위해서 중요한 역할을 할 것이다.

articles.title: 에이앤티글로벌, 도시 미관 살리고 안전도 지키는 스마트 LED 안내판
articles.description: SECON 2026서 스마트 LED 안내판 기반 안전 솔루션 공개CCTV 연계 시각 경고·원격 관리 기능으로 생활안전 및 범죄 예방 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 에이앤티글로벌이 ‘SECON & eGISEC 2026’에 참가해 CCTV 연계 스마트 LED 안내판 기반 생활안전 솔루션을 선보였다.이번 전시에서 에이앤티글로벌은 공원과 골목길 등 생활 밀착형 공간
articles.summary: 스마트 LED 안내판이 공원, 골목길에서 사용할 수 th_fed 있도록 활성화해 주기로 CRN의 CCTV연결을 시스템화한 SECON은 공간안전성과 생활안전성을 강화.
points: SECON는 아이디어에서 이미 보유하고 있는 LED 안내판 기능의 일부를 다중적으로 개선시킨 스마트 LED 안내판을 공개한다.
이 기능은 생활 지하청과 관련된 주요 위치의 CCTV 연계 시스템과 LED 안내판의 콘텐츠 공유를 도와준다.
범죄처 이용, 강화와 관련된 새로운 LED 안내판 기능을 개인정보 제공하는 방식으로 개선한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 LED 안내판의 콘텐츠 및 관련된 CCTV 연계 시스템은, 이전에는 LED 안내판과의 차이가 있지만 공개해서 사용자에게의 위기를 준비하고 있다.

articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 이테크시스템 “시만텍 이어 카본블랙 품었다... 금융권 온프레미스 EDR 정조준”
articles.description: [보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 이테크시스템은 20일까지 일산 킨텍스에서 열리는 ‘SECON & eGISEC 2026’에 참가해 브로드컴(Broadcom)의 시만텍(Symantec)과 카본블랙(Carbon Black)을 아우르는 강력한 엔터프라이즈 통합 보안 포트폴리오를 앞세워 참관객들의 발길을 사로잡았다.최근 브로드컴의 카본블랙 국내 총판 계약을 새롭게 체결한
articles.summary: [보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 이테크시스템은 20일까지 일산 킨텍스에서 열리는 ‘SECON & eGISEC 2026’에 참가해 브로드컴(Broadcom)의 시만텍(Symantec)과 카본블랙(Carbon Black)을 아우르는 강력한 엔터프라이즈 통합 보안 포트폴리오를 앞세워 참관객들의 발길을 사로잡았다. 최근 브로드컴의 카본블랙 국내 총판 계약을 새롭게 체결한
points: 최근 브로드컴의 카본블랙 국내 총판 계약을 새롭게 체결한
